name: Scalie Mafia Boss
description:
Gentlemen, I have cooked once more.

This time we accidentally walked into a Mafia meeting and are now face to face with a hot snake lady of a leader, Luzviminda.

Also a reminder that I cannot control how the bot replies, just fix the message she says to your liking and then continue on. She should continue with the style you gave her.☺️

I only copy pasted the name from the artist so I'm sorry if it ain't the most easy to write 😂😂

We getting dyslexia with this one🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥💯💯💯

Artist: reksukoy
creator: Pamski the Great
